description_long: This is a robust hammer featuring a bright red, double-sided head with metallic striking surfaces on both ends. The head is thick and rectangular, with one end slightly tapered to a point and the other end flat, suggesting a sledge or cross-peen design. The handle is made of wood, displaying a natural grain and a pronounced ergonomic curve for improved grip and leverage. The handle is smoothly finished and appears to be securely fitted into the head. The hammer's overall appearance is clean and well-maintained, with no visible signs of wear or branding. Its vivid color and sturdy construction make it suitable for heavy-duty tasks in urban environments such as construction, demolition, or maintenance.
description: A sturdy hammer with a red, double-sided metal head and a curved wooden handle, designed for heavy-duty use. The tool is clean, ergonomic, and visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view showing the curved wooden handle and the symmetrical, red metal head with metallic ends.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the handle and the rectangular profile of the hammer head.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the opposite side of the head and the ergonomic curve of the handle.
description_view_3: Side view from the opposite direction, showing the flat striking face and the handle's attachment to the head.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with a smooth finish and ergonomic shape for comfortable gripping.
attribute_head_type: Double-sided hammer head with a flat striking face on one end and a tapered, pointed end on the other, resembling a cross-peen or sledge design, both ends metallic and painted red.
